title: US Census query row
description: Legacy's catalog declares only 'name'/'estab' as illustrative Fields, but the real record shape is fully dynamic: every emitted field name is lower-cased directly from the header row of the API's array-of-arrays response, itself a function of the caller-supplied query_params 'get=' qualifier. additionalProperties is intentionally true to allow any caller-driven column through unfiltered (StreamHook uses projection: passthrough).

name.description: Present for the common 'get=NAME,...' shape; not guaranteed for every possible query_params qualifier.

estab.description: Present for the common 'get=...,ESTAB' shape; not guaranteed for every possible query_params qualifier.
